items.name: tool-call
items.title: Tool Call
items.description: A calm action card for agent tool use: intent + parameters before acting, approve/deny, an irreversible 'can't be undone' guard, and an honest status lifecycle. Accessible by default.

items.name: plan
items.title: Plan / Steps
items.description: Agent plan visibility with live per-step status. Accessible ordered list — status as text + colour, aria-current on the active step, progress summary, and ARIA live announcements.

items.name: confidence
items.title: Confidence
items.description: Communicate calibrated uncertainty, honestly. An accessible meter (role=meter) whose band is conveyed by label + icon + colour — never colour alone — so low confidence reads as caution.

items.name: citation
items.title: Citation
items.description: Inline source attribution you can verify. A compact marker that links to the source with an attribution accessible name, plus a hover/focus preview (title, source, quoted snippet) and a numbered <CitationList> sources section.

items.name: refusal
items.title: Refusal
items.description: Decline gracefully — a limit, not a dead end. States the decline plainly, explains why, and offers ways forward. Visually calm (not an error), with an accessible labelled region and a polite live announcement.

items.name: message
items.title: Message + Composer
items.description: Accessible chat message with first-class streaming (ARIA live region body, reduced-motion caret, stop/regenerate/copy) plus a Composer input — Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline, stop-while-streaming, and accessible attachments.
